column1: # NZ monthly international visitor arrivals and Google Trends search indices
column2: # Source: Stats NZ International Travel (April 2026 release); Google Trends (fetched 10 July 2026)
column3: # Arrivals: actual monthly overseas visitor arrivals
column4: # gt_travel: Google Trends index for 'new zealand travel' (NZ geo, 0-100)
column5: # gt_tourism: Google Trends index for 'new zealand tourism' (NZ geo, 0-100)
column6: # gt_holiday: Google Trends index for 'new zealand holiday' (NZ geo, 0-100)
column7: # gt_composite: simple average of the three indices
column8: # Note: Google Trends indices are relative to peak=100 within the 2010-2026 window
